keyPoints: People Over Process: Prioritize team members' expertise over rigid processes
Plan Over Perfection: Create a solid plan rather than trying to achieve perfection
Prevention Over Punishment: Focus on preventing problems rather than punishing mistakes
Prioritize Learning: Encourage learning from mistakes and experiences
Flexibility: Be adaptable and adjust plans according to changing circumstances
Continuous Improvement: Regularly assess and improve processes and plans
Proactive Risk Management: Anticipate and mitigate potential risks
Metrics Over Mystique: Use data to measure and evaluate performance
Iterative Development: Break down projects into manageable iterations
